NAME_EN.was: UNAIDS indicator code (source-faithful <Indicator_GId>.<Unit>; curated short codes assigned at conformance)

DESCRIPTION.now: Identifies the analytical series to which the observation belongs.
Primary spatial reference area for the observation.
Temporal reference of the observation, expressed using the accepted ISO 8601 time-period forms.
Age disaggregation of the observation.
Type of statistical estimate reported for the observation, such as point estimate, lower bound, or upper bound.
Sex disaggregation of the observation.
The actual measured numeric value.

NAME_EN.was: Unit of measure (canonical, per-(Indicator_GId, Unit) pair via indicator_unit_resolution.csv)

DESCRIPTION.now: The unit in which the observation value is expressed.
Scale factor applied to the observation value (e.g. thousands, millions).
Status code indicating the censoring relation that qualifies the observation value, or that no censoring relation applies.
Administrative level of the referenced geography, such as national, regional, or local.
Reporting frequency of the observation (annual, quarterly, monthly, daily, …).
Interpretive note associated with the observation.
Source or provenance statement associated with the observation.
